description: Both-branch coverage for §21.4 gates in mortgage-compliance-preflight. Provides step_outputs for each gated step so gate-branch-coverage.test.mjs can verify both the rule-match (early exit) and default (pass-through) branches.

vectors.name: gate1-fires-understated-violation
vectors.description: ART-217 (verify_trid_apr_accuracy) returns verdict=understated_violation → gate rule[0] fires → chain exits at ART-217, ART-218 and ART-219 skipped.

vectors.name: gate2-fires-qm-fail
vectors.description: ART-217 passes (accurate verdict) → gate1 default taken. ART-218 (check_qm_points_and_fees) returns pass=false → gate2 rule[0] fires → chain exits at ART-218, ART-219 skipped.

vectors.name: all-gates-default-full-chain
vectors.description: ART-217 accurate (gate1 default), ART-218 pass=true (gate2 default), ART-219 runs to completion. Covers both default branches.
